title: Primal
description: Enhances on the wilderness aspect of the game
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f83454a68e65e8cc41dc0d337007b8d88233e2.png) * * * # Introduction
Primal is a Forge/NeoForge mod that enhances Minecraft wilderness, making survival more immersive and exciting!
![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf4195afe91c34d812b70668566480dd7db064bc.png)

For a full breakdown of the mod's content, please check out our official wiki .
(Currently some contents may be missing)

## UPDATES **1.0 - Hunters** ![Hunters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d35b44870d11d133ae66a8319a3684f1792d28be.jpeg) **1.1 - Hunt & Gather** ![Hunt & Gather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3279725dd2b3374ec08485a71cdefa5eab5e7299.jpeg)
